diagrams.content:
%%{init: {'theme': 'default'}}%%
C4Context
    title System Context Diagram for Kanaele
    Person(customer, "Customer", "A user who consumes the one-way broadcast channels.")
    System(kanaele, "Kanaele", "A system that supports one-way broadcast channels.")
    System_Ext(broadcastService, "Broadcast Service", "External service that provides broadcast capabilities.")

    Rel(customer, kanaele, "Uses", "HTTP")
    Rel(kanaele, broadcastService, "Integrates with", "API")

flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[System Initialization]
    B --> C{One-Way-Broadcast-Kanaele?}
    C -->|Ja| D[Unterstützung aktivieren]
    C -->|Nein| E[Fehler: Unterstützung nicht vorhanden]
    D --> F[System bereit für One-Way-Broadcast]
    E --> G[Prozess beenden]
    F --> H[Ende]
    G --> H

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as Benutzer
    participant System as System
    participant Channel as One-Way-Broadcast-Kanaele

    User->>System: Anfrage zur Unterstützung von One-Way-Broadcast-Kanaelen
    System->>Channel: Initialisiere One-Way-Broadcast-Kanaele
    Channel-->>System: Bestätigung der Initialisierung
    System-->>User: Bestätigung der Unterstützung erhalten

diagrams.content:
classDiagram
    class Community {
        +String name
        +String description
        +List<Group> groups
        +addGroup(Group group)
        +removeGroup(Group group)
    }

    class Group {
        +String name
        +String description
        +List<Member> members
        +addMember(Member member)
        +removeMember(Member member)
    }

    class Member {
        +String username
        +String email
        +String role
    }

    Community "1" -- "0..*" Group : contains
    Group "1" -- "0..*" Member : includes

tasks.title: Feature: groups (24 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'groups' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 24 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/groups — Create group chat
  GET /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members — List group members
  POST /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members — Add members to group
  DELETE /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/members/{memberId} — Remove member from group
  PUT /api/v1/groups/{groupId}/roles — Update member roles
